tools.description: Get installed Godot version and resolved executable path.
tools.name: godot_get_version

tools.description: Recursively list Godot projects beneath a root directory.
tools.name: godot_list_projects

tools.description: Launch Godot editor for a project and return session details.
tools.name: godot_launch_editor

tools.description: Run a Godot project and return session details.
tools.name: godot_run_project

tools.description: Stop a running Godot process by session_id or latest session.
tools.name: godot_stop_execution

tools.description: Read buffered stdout/stderr from a session with cursor pagination.
tools.name: godot_get_debug_output

tools.description: Create a scene through the local Godot addon bridge.
tools.name: scene_create

tools.description: Add a node to a scene through the local Godot addon bridge.
tools.name: scene_add_node

tools.description: Load a sprite texture through the local Godot addon bridge.
tools.name: scene_load_sprite

tools.description: Export a mesh library through the local Godot addon bridge.
tools.name: scene_export_mesh_library

tools.description: Save a scene through the local Godot addon bridge.
tools.name: scene_save

tools.description: Get a Godot resource UID through the local addon bridge.
tools.name: uid_get

tools.description: Refresh UID references through the local addon bridge.
tools.name: uid_refresh_references

tools.description: Capture rendered output through the local addon bridge.
tools.name: render_capture

tools.description: Send interaction input through the local addon bridge.
tools.name: render_interact
